text.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِم، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ)).
text.arabicTranslated: (Allahumma inna najAAaluka fee nuhoorihim wanaAAoothu bika min shuroorihim.)
text.translated: (O Allah, we place You before them and we take refuge in You from their evil.)

text.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُدِي، وَأَنْتَ نَصِيرِي، بِكَ أَحُولُ وَبِكَ أَصُولُ، وَبِكَ أُقاتِلُ)).
text.arabicTranslated: (Allahumma anta AAadudee, wa-anta naseeree, bika ajoolu wabika asoolu wabika oqatil)
text.translated: (O Allah, You are my supporter and You are my helper, by You I move and by You I attack and by You I battle.)
(Allah is sufficient for us, and how fine a trustee (He is).)

title: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler
